truthAudit.Summary: Audit of Run 2 findings against the provided ground truth. Only SC-V3-005 (Stack Buffer Overflow) was correctly identified. All other vulnerabilities were missed. Run 2's two findings are supported by the source code and contain no false positives.

Items.Notes: Run 2 only identified admin console command injection, not config validation command injection.
Matches source code exactly and correctly identifies the lack of bounds checking before strcpy.
